title: Baby Bear Honey Picnic Plan
text:
## Honey Picnic Plan

Host: Baby Bear, baby bear

**Location:** The {adjective} {place} under a {color} sky.

**Menu:** {number} jars of {food}, tiny {plural noun}, and one emergency {object}.

**Activities:** {verb ending in -ing} with butterflies, learning to {verb}, and listening for a {sound} in the trees.

**Guest list:** One {adjective} {animal}, {person}, and anyone wearing a {clothing item}.

**Picnic rule:** If Baby Bear feels {emotion}, everyone must {verb} {adverb} and offer more honey.
